title: CS50X 2025 Portfolio
description: A curated collection of problem sets and coding projects from Harvard's CS50 2025. This compilation demonstrates foundational programming skills, including C, Python, SQL, and web development with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript course.

title: Coding Challenges
description: A collection of projects focused on converting designs into responsive, accessible, and performant web interfaces. These challenges from Frontend Mentor and roadmap.sh test my proficiency in semantic HTML, modern CSS, and JavaScript.

title: Course Booking API
description: RESTful API for managing course enrollments, featuring user registration, authentication, and retrieval of user details. Supports course creation, updates, archiving, activation, and student enrollment. Publicly documented using Postman.

title: Blogpost API
description: A RESTful blogging API built with Node.js, Express, and MongoDB that supports user authentication, post creation, and comment management. Security features include JWT authentication and password hashing with bcrypt.

title: Lapis
description: A full-stack blog application built with Vue 3 (Composition API) and a Node.js/Express backend. Users can register, authenticate, and create or manage posts through a responsive interface powered by Pinia state management and MongoDB.

title: Allure
description: A full-stack e-commerce application built with Vue 3 that supports customer shopping and admin product management. Features JWT authentication, role-based access control, cart and checkout functionality, order history, and a dynamic single-page interface powered by Vue Router.

title: Further
description: A horror, mystery, and thriller movie collection app built with Vue that focuses on organizing dark-themed films. The application features a clean interface for browsing movies and viewing structured film data.
